stemHtml: In the Flight Manual, the manufacturer has published the take-off performance data. This data has been calculated with brake release after the take-off power is set. Assuming all other factors remain unchanged, if the brakes are released BEFORE the take-off power is set, the Take-Off Distance (TOD) is expected to be (1) _____ and the Accelerate-Stop Distance (ASD) to be (2) _____.
